content_organization.landing_page: index.md highlights key features and differentiators with links to guides
content_organization.guides: Walkthrough-style documentation for installation, setup, features, configuration
content_organization.api: Technical reference for SDK, plugins, extensions, integrations
content_organization.examples: Executable code samples demonstrating common tasks and patterns

documentation_concepts.name: Local AI Integration
documentation_concepts.description: Connection to Ollama or LM Studio for on-device LLM inference

documentation_concepts.name: Zero Paywalls Philosophy
documentation_concepts.description: All features available from day one, no login gates or premium tiers

documentation_concepts.name: Built on Warp Foundation
documentation_concepts.description: Modern terminal based on Warp codebase with cloud dependencies removed

design_patterns.rationale: Markdown-based docs enable version control and enable contributor contributions
Organize guides around product features (Local AI, Configuration, etc.) rather than technical modules

architectural_rationale.vitepress_choice: Modern static site generator with great Markdown support and built-in search
architectural_rationale.docs_in_repo: Keeping docs in repo enables CI validation and version synchronization
architectural_rationale.concept_focused: Documentation emphasizes what users care about (features) over implementation details
